title: Nile Red Staining of Drosophila Larval Tissues
author: Elizabeth Allen
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.5x7g7rn

steps.instruction: Dissect tissues in ice cold PBS, keeping samples on ice until required sample size is obtained. 1X PBS (Phosphate-buffered saline )
Fix tissues in 4% PFA for 20 minutes. 00:20:00
Wash tissues 3x in PBS. 1X PBS (Phosphate-buffered saline )
Stain samples in Nile Red at 0.5 ug/mL diluted in PBS for 1 hour. 01:00:00 Nile Red prepared in acetone by Elizabeth Allen
Wash tissues 3x in PBS. 1X PBS (Phosphate-buffered saline )

Carefully replace the PBS with mounting medium before transferring samples to slides and imaging. * Image immediately, or temporarily store slides at 4°C. Mounting Media for Immunohistochemistry - Drosophila by Sonia M Hall
